chunks.text:
# Enterprise ERP Business Glossary

## Sales & Customer Management

### Customer
**Definition**: An individual or organization that purchases goods or services from the company. Customers can be classified as retail (B2C) or business (B2B) with different credit terms and pricing structures.

**Attributes**: customer_id, customer_name, customer_type, credit_limit, payment_terms, tax_id, registration_date, status

**Related Concepts**: Sales Order, Invoice, Payment, Customer Address, Credit Score
... [TRUNCATED]

## Inventory & Warehousing

### Warehouse
**Definition**: A physical location where inventory is stored. Warehouses can be company-owned, third-party logistics (3PL) facilities, or virtual locations for transit inventory.

**Attributes**: warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, location_address, capacity_cubic_meters, manager_id, status

**Related Concepts**: Inventory Transaction, Bin Location, Warehouse Zone, Stock Transfer

### Inventory Transaction
**Definition**: A record of any movem... [TRUNCATED]

## Human Resources

### Employee
**Definition**: An individual who works for the company under an employment contract. Employees can be full-time, part-time, contract, or temporary with different compensation and benefit structures.

**Attributes**: employee_id, first_name, last_name, employee_type, department_id, position_id, hire_date, status, salary, manager_id

**Related Concepts**: Department, Position, Employee Compensation, Time Entry, Performance Review

### Department
**Definition**: An... [TRUNCATED]

## Quality & Compliance

### Quality Inspection
**Definition**: A systematic examination of materials or products to verify conformance to specifications. Inspections can be incoming (from suppliers), in-process (during production), or final (before shipping).

**Attributes**: inspection_id, inspection_type, reference_type, reference_id, product_id, inspection_date, inspector_id, result, defects_found, status

**Related Concepts**: Product, Supplier, Purchase Receipt, Work Order, Quality Standar... [TRUNCATED]

## Reporting & Analytics

### Key Performance Indicator (KPI)
**Definition**: A quantifiable metric used to evaluate performance against strategic objectives. KPIs can be financial, operational, customer-facing, or employee-related.

**Common KPIs**: Order fulfillment rate, Inventory turnover, Supplier on-time delivery, Customer satisfaction, Employee productivity, Production yield

### Financial Statement
**Definition**: Formal reports summarizing financial performance and position. Primary sta... [TRUNCATED]

entities_post_resolution.name: Json
entities_post_resolution.definition: A JSON object field named triplets that stores an array of triplet items.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: "triplets" key in JSON object | content must contain "triplets": [...] | Requirement to return a correctly structured JSON matching the schema

entities_post_resolution.name: 10 Most Important Facts
entities_post_resolution.definition: A constraint or rule to identify, report, or consider only the ten most important facts.
synonyms: and limited to the ten most important facts
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: limit applies to 10 most important facts | Instruction to derive facts from original text with a cap of 10 items

entities_post_resolution.name: General Ledger Account
entities_post_resolution.definition: Accounts Payable is the liability representing amounts the company owes to suppliers for goods or services received on credit, tracked with due dates and payment workflows.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
### General Ledger Account
**Definition**: A chronological record of all financial transactions for a specific account type. Accounts are organized into a chart of accounts with hierarchies for balance sheet and income statement. | **Related Concepts**: Journal Entry, Account Hierarchy, Financial Statement, Budget | ### Accounts Payable
**Definition**: Money owed by the company to suppliers for goods or services received on credit. AP aging tracks payment due dates and supports payment approval workflows. | **Attributes**: ap_id, supplier_id, invoice_id, amount_due, due_date, discount_available, discount_until, status, payment_priority | ### Accounts Receivable
**Definition**: Money owed to the company by customers for goods or services delivered on credit. AR aging tracks overdue payments and supports collections workflows. | **Attributes**: ar_id, customer_id, invoice_id, amount_due, due_date, days_overdue, status, collection_status, last_contact_date

entities_post_resolution.name: Specific Storage Location
entities_post_resolution.definition: A specific storage location within a warehouse, organized into zones, aisles, shelves, and positions for efficient picking and put-away.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
### Bin Location
**Definition**: A specific storage location within a warehouse. Bin locations are organized into zones, aisles, shelves, and positions for efficient picking and put-away. | **Attributes**: bin_id, warehouse_id, zone_id, aisle, shelf, position, capacity_quantity, current_quantity, product_id | **Related Concepts**: Warehouse, Warehouse Zone, Product, Inventory Transaction | ### Warehouse
**Definition**: A physical location where inventory is stored. Warehouses can be company-owned, third-party logistics (3PL) facilities, or virtual locations for transit inventory.

entities_post_resolution.name: Budget Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A financial plan allocating resources across departments or projects for a specific period, identified by a budget_id, and used to compare budgeted amounts to actual results.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Attributes**: budget_id, budget_type, period_id, department_id, account_id, budgeted_amount, actual_amount, variance, status | ### Budget
**Definition**: A financial plan that allocates resources to departments, projects, or accounts for a specific period. Budgets are compared to actual results for variance analysis. | **Attributes**: bin_id, warehouse_id, zone_id, aisle, shelf, position, capacity_quantity, current_quantity, product_id

entities_post_resolution.name: Warehouse Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A unique identifier attribute for a warehouse, used to distinguish individual warehouse records within the inventory and fulfillment system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Attributes**: warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, location_address, capacity_cubic_meters, manager_id, status | ### Warehouse

entities_post_resolution.name: Ap Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: Accounts Payable ID used to identify and track a supplier's invoice within the accounts payable subsystem.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: ap_id, supplier_id, invoice_id, amount_due, due_date, discount_available, discount_until, status, payment_priority | **Attributes**: ar_id, customer_id, invoice_id, amount_due, due_date, days_overdue, status, collection_status, last_contact_date

entities_post_resolution.name: Financial Transaction
entities_post_resolution.definition: An identifier for a stock transfer between warehouses, representing a transfer event in inventory management.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
### Journal Entry
**Definition**: A recording of a financial transaction in double-entry bookkeeping. Each journal entry must balance with equal debits and credits. | **Attributes**: transaction_id, product_id, warehouse_id, transaction_type, quantity, transaction_date, reference_type, reference_id, unit_cost | **Attributes**: transfer_id, from_warehouse_id, to_warehouse_id, transfer_date, status, shipment_method, tracking_number

entities_post_resolution.name: Valid Json Object
entities_post_resolution.definition: A valid JSON object is a JSON data structure consisting of key-value pairs enclosed in braces that adheres to proper JSON syntax.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: output should be a valid JSON object | "triplets" key in JSON object

entities_post_resolution.name: Output Token Limit
entities_post_resolution.definition: A constraint that limits the maximum number of tokens that the system's output may contain.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: you suffered output token limit | Requirement to return a correctly structured JSON matching the schema | Source text indicates truncation occurred because the response exceeded token limit | previous response was cut off due to exceeding the output token limit | limit applies to 10 most important facts | output should be a valid JSON object

entities_post_resolution.name: Previous Response
entities_post_resolution.definition: The prior assistant reply produced earlier in the conversational session, used as a reference or continuation point in the interaction.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: previous response was cut off due to exceeding the output token limit | request is to re-extract from original text

entities_post_resolution.name: Audit Log
entities_post_resolution.definition:
### Audit Log
**Definition**: A chronological record of system events including logins, data changes, approvals, and errors. Audit logs support security monitoring and compliance requirements.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:

**Definition**: Core business entities that are shared across multiple business processes. Examples include Customer, Product, Supplier, and Employee records. | ### Master Data

tables_enriched.name: Customer Type
tables_enriched.description: Stores definitions for different customer types, including how they are identified, the type name and description, whether a credit check is required, and the default payment terms applicable to that ... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Customer
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about customers, including identifiers, contact and tax details, financial attributes, status, and timestamps for creation and updates.

tables_enriched.name: Customer_Address
tables_enriched.description: Stores the various addresses on file for customers, including the type and full address details, along with a flag indicating the default address and the timestamp when the record was created.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Contact
tables_enriched.description: Stores contact details for customers, including who is the primary contact, their role, and contact information for each customer.

tables_enriched.name: Product_Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about product categories, including hierarchical relationships between categories, identifiers, codes, names, and descriptive details for each category, along with the timestamp whe... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores product catalog data including identifiers, descriptions, pricing, physical attributes, storage requirements, hazard status, and audit timestamps.

tables_enriched.name: Price List
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about different price lists, including their identifiers, names, applicable currency, validity period, and current status.

tables_enriched.name: Product Price
tables_enriched.description: Stores pricing details for products, including price values, applicable price lists, minimum quantity thresholds, any discounts, and the date from which the price is effective.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about customer sales orders, including identifiers, dates, involved parties (customer, sales representative), shipment and payment details, amounts (subtotal, tax, freight, total), ... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores line items for sales orders, including product details, quantities, pricing, discounts, tax, and shipping dates for each ordered line.

tables_enriched.name: Invoice
tables_enriched.description: Stores billing documents and their financial details for customer orders, including amounts due, payments made, and current status.

tables_enriched.name: Invoice Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores detailed line items for invoices, including the product, quantity, pricing, tax, and the total amount for each line.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about payments received from customers, including how much was paid, when, by what method, and its linkage to the related customer and invoice.

tables_enriched.name: Supplier
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about suppliers, including identification, contact details, financial terms, performance metrics, and metadata on when records were created or updated.

tables_enriched.name: Supplier Address
tables_enriched.description: Stores the postal addresses associated with suppliers, including address type, lines, city, state, postal and country codes, whether it's the primary address, and when the record was created.

tables_enriched.name: Supplier Contact
tables_enriched.description: Stores contact information for suppliers, including the contact's name, role, contact details, and whether the contact is the primary point of contact.

tables_enriched.name: Supplier Contract
tables_enriched.description: Stores data about supplier contracts, including contract identifiers, supplier references, contract terms, validity period, renewal behavior, payment terms, currency, total contract value, status, and... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Purchase Order
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about purchase orders, including supplier details, order dates, financials (subtotal, taxes, freight, and total), currency, status, priority, approval tracking, and timestamps for c... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Purchase Order Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores line-item details for each purchase order, including quantities, pricing, discounts, taxes, and statuses for the ordered products from suppliers.

tables_enriched.name: Purchase Receipt
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of supplier purchase receipts, linking receipts to purchase orders, suppliers, and warehouses, and tracking receipt details such as date, responsible user, carrier, tracking number, and... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Purchase Receipt Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores line-item details for each purchase receipt, linking receipts to purchase order lines and products, including quantities, costs, lot information, location, expiration, and whether inspection is... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Warehouse
tables_enriched.description: Stores data about warehouse facilities, including identifiers, location, capacity, management, and status for inventory operations.

tables_enriched.name: Warehouse Zone
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about zones within warehouses, including identifiers, codes, names, types, and whether the zone is temperature-controlled.

tables_enriched.name: Bin Location
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about physical storage bins within warehouses, including location (warehouse, zone, aisle, shelf, and position), bin characteristics (type and code), and capacity details (quantity ... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Inventory On Hand
tables_enriched.description: Stores current inventory levels and associated details for products in specific warehouses, including quantities on hand, allocated quantities, available quantities, cost, and key dates for received a... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Inventory Transaction
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of inventory movements or transactions, detailing what product changed in which warehouse and bin, when the transaction occurred, the quantity and cost, and any references and reasons f... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Stock Transfer
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of inventory transfers between warehouses, including identifiers, dates, method of shipment, tracking, and status to track movement of stock.

tables_enriched.name: Stock Transfer Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores data about individual lines of stock transfers, including the product moved, source and destination bins, requested, shipped, and received quantities, and the transfer status.

tables_enriched.name: Production Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about production lines, including identifiers, location, capacity, setup time, status, and creation timestamp.

tables_enriched.name: Bill of Materials
tables_enriched.description: Stores the relationship between parent products and their component products in the manufacturing bill of materials, including quantities, unit of measure, scrap allowance, and the effective dating wi... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: WORK_ORDER
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about manufacturing work orders, including the product to be produced, production line and warehouse context, quantities (ordered, completed, and scrapped), key dates (start, requir... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Work Order Material
tables_enriched.description: Stores the materials required and issued for each work order, including quantities, costs, and storage location status.

tables_enriched.name: Production Schedule
tables_enriched.description: Stores scheduling information for production work orders, including planned and actual start/end times, line assignment, status, and priority.

tables_enriched.name: Quality Standard
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about quality standards, including identifiers, codes, names, types, versions, issue dates, status, and descriptive details used to define and reference applicable quality criteria.

tables_enriched.name: Quality Inspection
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of quality inspections performed on products, including inspection details, references, involved product and warehouse, results, defects found, sample and batch sizes, applicable standa... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Non Conformance Report
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of occurrences where products or processes did not meet quality standards, including identifications, impact, root cause, and actions taken to correct and prevent recurrence.

tables_enriched.name: Account Type
tables_enriched.description: Stores metadata about different account type classifications including their identifiers, codes, names, and how balances are handled.

tables_enriched.name: General Ledger Account
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about general ledger accounts, including identifiers, hierarchical relationships, currency, descriptions, status, and creation timestamp for financial accounting and reporting.

tables_enriched.name: Accounting Period
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about accounting periods, including identifiers, date ranges, fiscal year, and whether the period is closed with the timestamp of closure.

tables_enriched.name: Journal Entry
tables_enriched.description: Stores financial journal entries recording debits and credits for transactions, including metadata about the documents they originate from, approval status, and timestamps.

tables_enriched.name: Journal Entry Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores individual line items for journal entries, including monetary debit and credit amounts, associated accounts, descriptions, and any reference to external documents or cost centers.

tables_enriched.name: Accounts Receivable
tables_enriched.description: Stores monetary receivables and related invoice information for customers, including amounts, due dates, overdue status, and collection actions.

tables_enriched.name: Accounts Payable
tables_enriched.description: Stores accounts payable data, including invoices from suppliers, amounts due and paid, payment terms and statuses, and relevant dates for tracking outstanding obligations.

tables_enriched.name: Budget
tables_enriched.description: Stores planned and actual financial allocations for departments, including amounts, currency, and status for a given fiscal year.

tables_enriched.name: Department
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about organizational departments, including hierarchy, management, budgeting references, location, and status, with a timestamp for when records were created.

tables_enriched.name: Position
tables_enriched.description: Stores details about job positions including codes, titles, related department, compensation ranges, and status information for human resources and workforce planning.

tables_enriched.name: Employee
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about employees, including personal details, job role, organizational structure, compensation, contact information, location, and record creation metadata.

tables_enriched.name: Time Entry
tables_enriched.description: Stores time entry records for work performed, including hours worked, work type, related project and employee, submission and approval details.

tables_enriched.name: Carrier
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about carriers used for shipments, including identifiers, contact details, service levels, and status.

tables_enriched.name: Shipping Route
tables_enriched.description: Stores data about shipping routes, including identifiers, origin and destination locations, route characteristics (distance, estimated time, carrier, service level), pricing per kilometer, status, and... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores data about shipments, including identifiers, routing, dates, carrier, tracking, costs, weight, and status for tracking and management of outbound and inbound deliveries.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores the individual line items for shipments, including product references, quantities, units, weights, and any related line references for each shipment.

tables_enriched.name: Project
tables_enriched.description: Stores project data, including identifiers, naming, type, associated customer and manager, timelines, budget vs actual costs, status, priority, and descriptive details.

tables_enriched.name: PROJECT_TASK
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about tasks within projects, including task details, scheduling dates, assigned personnel, effort estimates and actuals, status, and priority to manage project work items.

tables_enriched.name: APP_USER
tables_enriched.description: Stores user account information, including identifiers, login credentials and metadata, along with optional associations to employee, customer, or supplier records for access control and audit trackin... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Role
tables_enriched.description: Stores data about roles within the organization, including identifiers, codes, names, types, descriptions, operational status, and creation timestamp.

tables_enriched.name: User Role
tables_enriched.description: Stores the assignments of roles to users, including when the role was assigned, who assigned it, and its expiry and current status.

tables_enriched.name: Audit Log
tables_enriched.description: Stores a log of events and changes tracked in the system, recording who performed an action, on what entity, what the previous and new values were, and the time and source of the event.
